creator: mvv@col.ru
text:
I run /stand/ppp under FreeBSD 2.2.7 or 2.2.5, dial and login OK by PAP authentication with my ISP's Cisco router, after some seconds link disconnected and I give "Error: OpenModem failed: /dev/cuaa1: Interrupted system call"
What does it mean? If it possible, please answer

Fix: 

No fixes, bug presented within ppp code with FreeBSD 2.2.7 and 2.2.5 both.
How-To-Repeat: Everytime I run ppp. Absolutly stable bug. Without exception.
